Container.Name: Qwen3-TTS-API
Container.Overview: OpenAI-compatible Text-to-Speech API powered by Qwen3-TTS (Alibaba Qwen Team). 10 languages, voice cloning from 3-second audio, voice design, instruction-based emotion control, and 9 built-in voices. Supports RTX 50-series (Blackwell) GPUs. First start downloads model files (~3-7GB depending on model size) from HuggingFace. China users: set HF_ENDPOINT to https://hf-mirror.com for faster downloads. Requires NVIDIA GPU with driver 550+.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: OpenAI-compatible TTS API port. Swagger docs at /docs

Config.Name: Model Cache
Config.Description: Model download cache. First run downloads ~3-7GB. Persists across container recreates.

Config.Name: Model ID
Config.Description: Model to load. Base models support voice clone. CustomVoice models have 9 built-in voices. See README for all options.

Config.Name: Dtype
Config.Description: Model precision. bfloat16 recommended. Use float16 for older GPUs without bf16 support.

Config.Name: HuggingFace Endpoint
Config.Description: HuggingFace download mirror. China users: change to https://hf-mirror.com

Config.Name: Attention Implementation
Config.Description: Attention backend. flash_attention_2 (fastest, needs flash-attn), flash_attention_2 (PyTorch native), eager (safest fallback).
